posts.title: Join the Most-Awaited Chatbot Conference
posts.summary: 🚀 What to Expect The conference features a range of events designed to enrich attendees’ understanding of the chatbot industry: Expert Keynotes : Get insights from industry leaders at the forefront of AI innovation. Workshops : These certified workshops provide hands-on experience, helping participants design and deploy their own AI agents. Whether you’re looking to master AI automation or enhance chatbot designs, these workshops are crafted to guide you through each step​. Panels and Discussions : Interactive panels allow you to learn directly from pioneers in the field, addressing topics…
posts.author: Cassandra C.
